description_long: An elderly male figure is depicted standing upright, dressed in a full-body suit with a deep V-shaped opening at the chest, bordered by a lighter, fur-like trim. The suit is form-fitting and features a belt-like detail around the waist, with the sleeves and pants extending to the wrists and ankles. The figure has a full head of short, neatly styled hair and a matching beard and mustache, giving him a distinguished appearance. His facial features are stern and defined, with a prominent brow and high cheekbones. The hands are relaxed and slightly open, and the feet are clad in simple, sturdy shoes. The overall appearance suggests a festive or uniformed character, possibly inspired by traditional holiday attire.
description: An elderly man stands upright in a form-fitting suit with a fur-trimmed chest opening, a belt detail, and sturdy shoes, featuring a full beard and neatly styled hair.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full suit with fur-trimmed chest, facial features, and both arms extended slightly outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the suit's fit, and the straight posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the suit, the belt detail, and the back of the head and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and the suit's contour along the body.
attribute_clothing_type: full-body suit with fur-trimmed chest opening and belt detail
attribute_hairstyle: short, neatly styled hair with full beard and mustache
